layout.title: ClubSOS
layout.description: Your comprehensive medical platform. Manage appointments, benefits, and your family group securely.
layout.feature1Desc: Manage your appointments, prescriptions, and medical documents quickly and securely from your device.
layout.feature2Desc: Access a wide network of certified specialists and clinics with guaranteed quality.
layout.feature3Desc: Our medical and administrative support team is always available for you in case of any emergency.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Welcome back to Club SOS Medical
login.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number (at least 8 digits).

footer.copyright: Club SOS Medical. All rights reserved.

signup.step1Subtitle: Select your role on the platform
signup.titularDesc: I am an employee of an SOS Medical affiliated company.
signup.familiarDesc: A primary account member invited me to the platform.
signup.step2Subtitle: Enter the unique code provided by your company or primary member.
signup.step3Subtitle: To link you as a family member, we need to identify your primary member.
signup.titularNamePlaceholder: Exactly as it appears on their ID
signup.titularFoundDesc: The member exists in the company and is active.
signup.step4Subtitle: We will use this WhatsApp number to send appointment alerts and as your main login.
signup.step5Subtitle: Almost done. Enter your personal details and access credentials.
signup.phoneError: Please enter a valid phone number (at least 8 digits).

errors.companyNotFound: Company not found. Please check the code and try again.
errors.phoneExists: This phone number is already registered. Please log in.
errors.invalidSession: Invalid session. Please verify your number again.
errors.emailExists: This email is already registered with another account. Please use a different one.

miembro.title: Member Dashboard

inicio.greetingSub: Here is a summary of your account

documentos.title: Recent Documents

doctor.title: Select your doctor
doctor.subtitle: Choose the healthcare professional
doctor.noDoctors: No doctors available for this service

fecha.title: When do you want your appointment?
fecha.subtitle: Select an available date
fecha.constraintInfo: You can book at least 1 day ahead and up to 3 months in the future. Sundays are not available.

horario.title: Select your time slot
horario.subtitle: Choose the time that works best for you

confirmar.title: Confirm your appointment
confirmar.subtitle: Review the details before confirming
confirmar.pendingNote: Your appointment will be pending approval. The medical team will confirm it shortly.
confirmar.error: Error scheduling appointment. Please try again.

beneficios.title: Benefits
beneficios.subtitle: Explore discounts and promotions available to you.
beneficios.emptySub: There are no active benefits for your company at this time.

avisos.title: Announcements
avisos.subtitle: Stay up to date with Club SOS Medical notices.

documentos.subtitle: View and download your medical results and reports.
